audit_items.proof_trace: Property is enforced by Rust's type system. The function signature returns Result<[Cell; CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB], Error> where CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB is a compile-time constant (128). Rust's type checker guarantees that any Ok(cells) result contains exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB elements; returning a different-sized array would be a compilation error.
